purpose: This policy applies when <<LAB_NAME>> performs mixed lymphocyte culture (MLC) testing for transplant compatibility. Required by 42 CFR 493.1262 (specialty histocompatibility).

cfr_text_blocks.label: Standard: Histocompatibility
cfr_text_blocks.verbatim: If the laboratory performs histocompatibility testing, the laboratory must, as applicable, meet the requirements specified in 493.1278(b) through (k).

scope: Applies only when <<LAB_NAME>> performs histocompatibility MLC. Personnel and the medical director or designee.
policy_statements: MLC testing is performed per the validated procedure with documented technologist competency.
Controls (positive responder, negative responder, autologous control) are run on each MLC plate per the lab's procedure.
Results are interpreted by qualified personnel per the procedure's interpretation criteria; reported with stimulation index and reference range.
procedure_steps: Set up MLC per the validated procedure with required controls.
Read at the procedure-defined time points; calculate stimulation index.
Interpret per the criteria; report with appropriate clinical comment.
definitions: Test of in vitro lymphocyte proliferation when responder and stimulator cells are co-cultured. Used in transplant compatibility assessment.
